<?php namespace Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware; namespace Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware; use Closure; use Spatie\FlareClient\Glows\GlowRecorder; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; class AddGlows implements FlareMiddleware { protected GlowRecorder $recorder; public function __construct(GlowRecorder $recorder) { $this->recorder = $recorder; } public function handle(Report $report, Closure $next) { foreach ($this->recorder->glows() as $glow) { $report->addGlow($glow); } return $next($report); } }
